supporting_evidence: RD-Agent real LLM-proposed research hypothesis: Simple momentum, volatility, volume, and price-based factors derived from daily price and volume data will provide predictive signals for future returns, as they capture trend, risk, liquidity, and reversal patterns.

Reason: Starting with classic and computationally efficient factors allows rapid testing and validation. Momentum factors (e.g., 10-day return) exploit trend persistence; volatility factors (e.g., 5-day rolling standard deviation) capture risk premia; volume factors (e.g., relative volume) indicate liquidity and informed trading; price range factors (e.g., (high-low)/close) measure intraday volatility. These diverse perspectives are likely to yield initial strong predictive performance and serve as building blocks for more complex factors.

Real LLM-formulated factor '10-Day Momentum': [Momentum Factor] The total return over the last 10 trading days, measuring short-term trend persistence. [formulation: \frac{P_{t} - P_{t-10}}{P_{t-10}}]
